name: UNION BANKSHARES INC
summary: Union Bankshares, Inc. is a Vermont-based one-bank holding company whose sole subsidiary is Union Bank, a state-chartered community bank founded in 1891. Operating 18 branch locations and three loan centers across northern Vermont and northern New Hampshire, Union Bank offers retail and commercial banking, municipal financing, SBA loans, residential and commercial real estate loans, online cash management, merchant services, and wealth management and trust services.

products.name: Commercial Loans
products.description: Business loans for plant and equipment, working capital, real estate renovation, and other commercial purposes.

products.name: Commercial Real Estate Loans
products.description: Loans on income-producing properties including commercial construction loans.

products.name: SBA Guaranteed Loans
products.description: Small Business Administration guaranteed lending products for business customers.

products.name: Residential Construction and Mortgage Loans
products.description: Home construction financing and residential mortgage lending products.

products.name: Municipal Financing
products.description: Loans and excess deposits secured by FHLB letters of credit for local municipalities and school districts.

products.name: Online Cash Management Services
products.description: Includes ACH origination, wire transfers, positive pay, account reconciliation, and night depository.

products.name: Wealth Management and Trust Services
products.description: Personal and institutional wealth management and trust services offered through Union's Wealth Management Group.

products.name: Retail Deposit Accounts
products.description: Checking, savings, money market, CDs, IRA/SEP/KEOGH, and Health Savings accounts for individuals.

products.name: Telephone, Internet, and Mobile Banking
products.description: Digital banking services including bill pay, mobile app, and online account opening.

products.name: Merchant Credit Card Services
products.description: Deposit and immediate credit of sales drafts for merchant customers.

products.name: Remote Deposit Capture
products.description: Remote check deposit service for merchant customers.

products.name: Debit MasterCard and ATM Cards
products.description: Debit and ATM card services for retail customers.

partnerships.description: Source of borrowings and FHLB letters of credit used to secure municipal deposits.
Used for purchasing brokered deposits as an additional funding source.
